creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thursday 15 January 2009, Renato Botelho wrote:
> On Sat, Jan 03, 2009 at 12:54:21AM +0100, Hans Petter Selasky wrote:
> > Hi,
> >
> > Have you tried on different computers?
> >
> > Is the problem the same everwhere?
> >

>
> Do you need any more information?

Hi,

I see that your HC is a VIA. They have a known problem about set address I've 
been told. I will see if I can work it around. I will notify you when there 
are patches ready to test.

--HPS
